title: Happyville Spring Farmers Market
body: Join Happyville’s finest farmers, bakers, and artisans every Saturday this spring! Enjoy fresh produce, handmade soaps, and baked treats. Live acoustic music, a bounce house for the kids, and cooking demos all morning long.

title: Happyville Fourth of July Parade & Fireworks
body: Kick off Independence Day with Happyville’s iconic parade downtown! Wave flags, enjoy food vendors, and gather later at Riverfront Park for a breathtaking fireworks finale at 9:00 PM.

title: Town Hall Meeting: Community Budget Planning
body: Meet your elected officials and weigh in on the upcoming budget! All residents are invited to Happyville Town Hall to share ideas and concerns. Public comments welcome.

title: Happyville Neighborhood Block Party
body: Celebrate summer with your neighbors! Oak Street will close to traffic and open to fun — food trucks, live music, and games for the kids. Bring your lawn chairs and enjoy an evening under the string lights!

title: Fourth of July Celebration Poster
body: Don’t miss our annual Independence Day celebration! Parade in the morning, concerts throughout the day, and fireworks after dark. A full day of patriotic fun for the whole family.

title: Happyville Harvest Festival
body: Celebrate the changing seasons with pumpkin painting, local vendors, and hayrides. The Town Square turns into a fall wonderland with apple cider, music, and autumn crafts for all ages.

title: Happyville Holiday Tree Lighting
body: Join us on the City Hall lawn for the lighting of the Happyville Tree! Sip hot cocoa, sing carols, and welcome Santa Claus himself. Bring a canned good for our community food drive.

title: Happyville Community Yard Sale
body: Clear your garage and find treasure at the town-wide yard sale! Residents set up tables outside their homes for a morning of bargains, barter, and meeting new neighbors.

title: Happyville Downtown Art Walk
body: Stroll downtown and discover the work of local artists, live mural painting, music performances, and refreshments. Support the arts and explore Main Street galleries after hours.

title: Happyville Tree Lighting (Alt Poster)
body: Bring the family to the Town Square for a magical night! Enjoy seasonal songs, a visit from Santa, and a twinkling tree lighting ceremony. Free cocoa and cookies provided!
